title: Vasi's Create addon
description: Vasi's Create addon is a simple addon to create, currently it only adds music discs
body: Vasi's Create Addon is a new extension to the popular Create mod, designed to enhance your gameplay with exciting features. In its initial release, the addon introduces a collection of unique music discs, adding a fresh layer of ambiance to your Minecraft world. As the very first version, this addon is just the beginning—future updates will bring a wide range of additional content and features, expanding both the creative and mechanical possibilities within the Create mod. Stay tuned for more exciting developments as Vasi's Create Addon evolves! If you have any questions ask them Here [https://discord.gg/c8gqBvc56q]
